folders.01_brand: Logo panel, symbol crop, wordmark crop, tagline crop, editable SVG logo.
folders.02_hero: Hero banner crop for homepage or landing page.
folders.03_characters: Character trait overview crops from the reference board.
folders.04_collection_tiles: Collection panel and individual tile crops.
folders.05_merch: Merch panel and product tile crops.
folders.06_ui_icons_buttons: CTA buttons, UI icons, and editable SVG lightning.
folders.11_generated_highres: Fresh high-res generated artwork assets for the Muzikaz look.
folders.12_transparent_attempts: PNG assets with dark backgrounds removed where practical. Keep originals for final editing.

note: The uploaded board is a flattened image. Crops are production starter assets; true layered assets require individual character/object renders or manual masking.
